title: Applied Pneumatics
description: An add-on connects AE2 and Pneumatic Craft.
body:
# Applied Pneumatics

An add-on for **Applied Energistics 2** × **PneumaticCraft: Repressurized**. Brings **compressed air storage**, convenient **temperature control**, and **automated Amadron trading** into the ME Network. ## Features Overview * **Air Storage**: Adds ME Air Storage Cells. The portable version can also function as an air tank. * **ME Pressure Interface**: Maintains a target pressure by inserting/extracting air from the ME Network. Externally follows PneumaticCraft’s high-to-low pressure diffusion. * **ME Temperature Interface**: Consumes AE energy and compressed air to maintain a set temperature. Externally follows PneumaticCraft’s natural heat diffusion. * **P2P Tunnels**: Two new tunnel types (Air / Temperature) for cross-area distribution and balancing. * **Amadron Integration**: Wireless Terminal + Processing Station. Supports saving “infinite supply trades” as patterns for AE automation. * **AE Bus Compatibility**: Import/Export/Storage buses can interact with air containers. * **New Amadron Trades**: Adds new trades for buying and selling basic resources. ## Other Info - **Compat / Integrations** - Install **MEGA Cells** to unlock larger **ME Air Storage Cells** (from **1M** up to **256M**). - Install **ExtendedAE** to unlock an extended version of the **Amadron Processing Station**. - **Built-in Resource Pack** - This mod includes a built-in resource pack that lets you use the **AE 1.20.1-style** visuals on **1.21.1**, and vice versa. - **Dark Resource Pack** - If you want a dark theme, please download **[Applied Pneumatics Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/applied-pneumatics-dark-mode)**. - **In-game Documentation** - A detailed feature guide is available in-game via **GuideME**. ## License - **Code**: [LGPL-3.0](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/lgpl-3.0.html) - **Art & Assets**: [CC BY-NC-SA 3.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/3.0/)
